doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The memo contradicts Florida's actual LFO requirements upheld in Jones v. DeSantis and contains no verifiable issuance from the Division of Elections.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This contradicts actual Florida law and SB7066 which still requires LFO payment; "Jones v. DeSantis" was decided against this position, and no such memo exists.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The memo contradicts Florida's actual LFO requirements upheld in Jones v. DeSantis and contains no verifiable issuance from the Division of Elections.
